name: think-twice
description: A multi-tenant knowledge logging platform for engineering teams
author: Think Twice Team

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../org-service && npm install && cd ../entry-service && npm install && cd ../analytics-service && npm install && cd ../../client && npm install
scripts.test:integration: npm run infra && sleep 3 && bash verify.sh
